message.content:
@startuml
title System Sequence Diagram: Record vaccine administration

actor Nurse
participant ":System" as system #LightBlue2

Nurse -> system : 1 starts recording the administration of a vaccine to a SNS user\nactivate system
system --> Nurse : 2 requests to select the SNS user\ndeactivate system
Nurse -> system : 3 selects the SNS user\nactivate system
system --> Nurse : 4 shows SNS user information (Name, Age and Adverse Reactions) \nand ask for confirmation\ndeactivate system
Nurse -> system : 5 confirms the information\nactivate system
system --> Nurse : 6 requests to select the vaccine to be administered \nand the lot number\ndeactivate system
Nurse -> system : 7 selects the vaccine and inputs lot number\nactivate system
system --> Nurse : 8 shows data and request confirmation\ndeactivate system
Nurse -> system : 9 confirms the data\nactivate system
system --> Nurse : 10 informs operation success and asks if should start the recovery period\ndeactivate system
Nurse -> system : 11 confirms to start the recovery period\nactivate system
system --> Nurse : 12 after the recovery period,\nsends SMS message informing the SNS user that he can leave the vaccination center\ndeactivate system

@enduml
